nasb.text: So Achish believed David, saying, “He has surely made himself odious among his people Israel; therefore he will become my servant forever.”

esv.text: And Achish trusted David, thinking, “He has made himself an utter stench to his people Israel; therefore he shall always be my servant.”

cnv.text: 亞吉相信了大衛，心裡說：“他在自己的族人以色列中留下了臭名，他必永遠作我的僕人了。”

ccb.text: 亚吉相信了大卫的话，心里想：“以色列人恨透了大卫，他必永远留在迦特做我的仆人。”
